name: Hythm
bio: Hythm has lived many lives, though as of recently he can't remember any of them. He had his memories sealed away with his crown, then gave that crown to Aluccard -- he could no longer bear the pain of living forever, and would rather live as a mortal, treating every day as though it could be his last.

That's what he told himself, at least. When Aluccard finds him, what he sees is a depressed man with a crippling gambling addiction. Aluccard offers him the crown, and his old memories along with it, but the mortal-minded Hythm rejects the notion entirely and asks his old friend to leave. Aluccard knows Hythm may still be a target regardless -- and he can't stand by and watch a friend be murdered, wanted or not.
